name: Clam Chowder for 60
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain and rinse the clams, reserving the juice; set aside.
2. In a large kettle, sauté onions in butter until tender.
3. Add flour; stir to form a smooth paste.
4. Gradually add the milk, stirring constantly until slightly thickened (do not boil).
5. Add celery, parsley, and potatoes; cook until tender, about 45 minutes.
6. Add the clams and cheese; cook until the cheese is melted and the soup is heated through.
7. Add the reserved clam juice and salt and pepper to taste.
